dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, {quest_threat} struck this morning and made off with {quest_focus}. The trail is still fresh but it will not last.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: I need someone who can {quest_action} before the trail goes cold. {quest_ally} spotted tracks heading {location_hint}. If you find {quest_item} along the way, grab them: they were part of what was taken.
dialogueChunks.outro: {quest_stakes} are at risk if word spreads that we cannot protect our own.

playerResponses.text: I will pick up the trail. They will not get far.
What exactly was taken? I want to know what I am recovering.
Hire a tracker. I am no bloodhound.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, {quest_threat} attacked {quest_stakes} at first light and fled before anyone could respond. {quest_focus} left signs heading into the wilds.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: We need to {quest_action} and deal with this before it circles back. The {enemy_type} was last seen {location_hint}. Take some {quest_item} in case you need to draw it out.
dialogueChunks.outro: This must be done {quest_time_pressure}. The longer we wait, the more dangerous it becomes.

playerResponses.text: A dangerous hunt. I want proper pay.

dialogueChunks.intro: Since {quest_origin}, {quest_threat} has not been seen. {player_name}, {quest_focus} was left wide open and something got through.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: I need you to {quest_action}. Tracks lead {location_hint}. {quest_ally} thinks there may be a reason behind this, but we need answers. Bring back any {quest_item} you find along the way.
dialogueChunks.outro: {quest_stakes} have a gap in them until we sort this out. Every hour matters.

playerResponses.text: I will find them and get to the bottom of this.
Sounds more like a mystery than a chase.
